overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival video game depicting a character walking through a dense forest at night. The player character ignites a wooden torch midway through the clip, casting warm flickering light on the dirt path and surrounding trees.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along a dark forest path with minimal visibility

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense forest, barely visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view of walking through a pitch-black forest at night. The path is barely visible as a dark strip winding through dense vegetation, with the camera moving steadily forward through the darkness.

events.description: character raises a lit torch, illuminating the forest path with warm flickering light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail while holding a torch to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: wooden torch with bright flame held in left hand, casting warm orange light and dynamic shadows
tall trees with visible bark texture and foliage illuminated by the torchlight
tall trees with visible bark texture and foliage illuminated by the torchlight

segments.scene_description: The torch illuminates the forest trail with warm flickering light, revealing the dirt path and surrounding trees that were previously hidden in darkness. The character continues walking forward as the torchlight casts dynamic shadows through the dense forest vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a pitch-black forest that transforms into a warmly lit trail. It begins with the camera moving steadily forward through oppressive darkness, where the path is barely visible as a dark strip winding through dense vegetation. As a wooden torch is ignited, the scene shifts abruptly from void to visibility, flooding the environment with warm, flickering light. This illumination reveals the texture of the dirt path and the surrounding trees that were previously hidden, while the camera continues its forward progress. The shot concludes with the torchlight casting dynamic shadows across the dense forest foliage as the character advances.
